label: 几何 QC（连通/孤岛/AABB）
description: 对 Geometry 做静态几何质量检查（articraft geometry_qc 的轻量等价）：① part-joint 连通分量，孤岛 part；② 每个 part 的 shape 是否能解析出 AABB；③ joint origin 距 parent / child AABB 中心是否合理；④ 兄弟 part AABB 两两重叠（rest pose 静态干涉）；⑤ 几何丰富度信号（仅裸 primitive 时提示）；⑥ 悬空件（无关节路径到根）；⑦ 孤立 profile（未被 extrude/loft/revolve/part 消费）；⑧ lathe/revolve 误喂 XY profile；⑨ mesh-backed 布尔误用（pipe/sweep/section_loft 进布尔）。输出结构化 signals 供修复循环读取。只读分析，不改 Geometry。
description-en: Static geometry quality checks (lightweight equivalent of articraft geometry_qc): (1) connected components from joints; (2) parts whose shape cannot reduce to an AABB; (3) joint origins far from parent/child AABB centers; (4) sibling AABB overlaps in rest pose; (5) primitive-only richness hint; (6) floating links with no joint path to root; (7) orphan profiles not consumed by extrude/loft/revolve/part; (8) lathe/revolve fed an XY-centered profile; (9) mesh-backed boolean misuse (pipe/sweep/section_loft into a boolean). Emits a structured signals array for fix loops. Read-only.

inputs.name: joint_origin_tol
inputs.label: joint origin 容差 (m)
inputs.description: joint origin 距 parent / child AABB 任一面距离超出该值 → 报告。articraft 默认 0.015，这里给一个略宽松的 0.05。
inputs.description-en: Joint origin tolerance from parent/child AABB face. Defaults to 0.05m (articraft uses 0.015).

inputs.name: overlap_tol
inputs.label: AABB 重叠容差 (m)
inputs.description: 兄弟 part 之间 AABB 三轴最小重叠深度都超过该值才算重叠（≤ 0 = 仅接触不算干涉）。
inputs.description-en: Minimum overlap depth on every axis to flag interpenetration.

inputs.name: check_overlaps
inputs.label: 检查兄弟 part 重叠
inputs.description: rest pose 下兄弟 part AABB 两两干涉检测；关闭后只跑连通 / shape / joint origin 三项。
inputs.description-en: Toggle pairwise sibling AABB overlap check.

inputs.name: allow_pairs
inputs.label: 允许重叠 pair
inputs.description: 允许的 part pair 字符串数组，格式为 partA:partB 或 partA,partB。
inputs.description-en: Allowed overlapping part pairs, as partA:partB or partA,partB strings.

inputs.name: allow_joints
inputs.label: 允许 joint origin
inputs.description: 允许跳过 joint-origin 距离检查的 joint id 数组。
inputs.description-en: Joint ids allowed to skip joint-origin distance findings.

outputs.name: geometry
outputs.label: 几何
outputs.description: 原样透传，便于继续接下游

outputs.name: valid
outputs.label: 通过
outputs.description: 无任何 issue 时为 true
outputs.description-en: True when no issues are found.

outputs.name: report
outputs.label: 报告
outputs.description: 多行人类可读报告（每行一个 issue）；valid 时通常为空，但仍可能含非致命的 primitive_only 提示行
outputs.description-en: Multiline human-readable report (one issue per line); usually empty when valid, but may still carry the non-fatal primitive_only hint line.

outputs.name: islands
outputs.label: 连通分量数
outputs.description: part 通过 joint 形成的连通分量数；> 1 表示有孤岛
outputs.description-en: Number of connected components among parts via joints.

outputs.name: missing_aabb
outputs.label: AABB 缺失 part 数
outputs.description: shape 无法解析出 AABB 的 part 数
outputs.description-en: Parts whose shape cannot be reduced to an AABB.

outputs.name: overlaps
outputs.label: AABB 重叠对数
outputs.description: rest pose 下相互重叠的兄弟 part 对数
outputs.description-en: Number of sibling part AABB overlap pairs.

outputs.name: primitive_only
outputs.label: 仅裸 primitive
outputs.description: true = 模型里所有 shape 都是裸 primitive（box/cylinder/...），完全没有富几何——没有 CSG 实体、没有 Parts（含齿轮）/Architecture、也没有烘焙 mesh。**与是否用 part/joint 组装无关**：把一堆 box 包成 part 再连 joint 仍是堆方块。建议重新拆解（非致命，不影响 valid）
outputs.description-en: true = every shape in the model is a bare primitive (box/cylinder/...) with no rich geometry at all — no CSG solid, no Parts (incl. gears)/Architecture, no baked mesh. Independent of whether parts/joints are used: boxes wrapped in parts and joints are still stacked boxes. Reconsider the decomposition. Non-fatal; does not affect valid.

outputs.name: floating_links
outputs.label: 悬空件数
outputs.description: 有 joint 时，无关节路径到根树的 part 数（运行时会被 URDF 丢弃）
outputs.description-en: Parts with no joint path to the root tree (dropped at runtime by URDF).

outputs.name: orphan_profiles
outputs.label: 孤立 profile 数
outputs.description: 未被 extrude/loft/revolve/part 消费的 profile 数（会烘成 ~2mm 预览薄板）
outputs.description-en: Profiles not consumed by extrude/loft/revolve/part (bake to a ~2mm preview slab).

outputs.name: signals
outputs.label: 结构化信号
outputs.description: 结构化 signals 数组：{code, severity(error/warning/note), message, ids?}。涵盖 islands/aabb_missing/joint_origin/aabb_overlap/primitive_only/floating_link/orphan_profile/lathe_xy_profile/mesh_boolean_misuse，供修复循环按 code 读取。
outputs.description-en: Structured signals array {code, severity, message, ids?} covering islands/aabb_missing/joint_origin/aabb_overlap/primitive_only/floating_link/orphan_profile/lathe_xy_profile/mesh_boolean_misuse for fix loops.
